strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java/Kotlin) with a strong emphasis on clean, testable architecture
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, Model Context Protocol) and emerging tech trends relevant to automation tooling
Proven track record of shipping scalable solutions (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of mails annually, low-latency microservices)
concerns: Primary stack alignment issue: React (not Vitest) and limited explicit experience with Nest.js or Vitest in listed roles
No clear evidence of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) depth beyond AWS CDK mention, which may not cover full requirements
Recent role at re:cinq (April 2025–present) lacks detailed project specifics, making current relevance assessment difficult
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with TypeScript/Node.js and relevant AI-agent experience, but gaps in primary stack alignment (Nest.js, Vitest) and cloud platform depth require verification. His 11+ years of experience, architecture focus, and customer-oriented delivery (e.g., Direct Mail platform) suggest high potential, though recent role details are sparse.
